	- (165*x^56 + 5445*x^55 + 87615*x^54 + 916245*x^53 + 7020585*x^52 + 42187509*x^51 + 207868391*x^50 + 866895345*x^49 + 3135483843*x^48 + 10040057861*x^47 + 29003534331*x^46 + 76916273373*x^45 + 189995407083*x^44 + 441275600076*x^43 + 966625474572*x^42 + 1992090992398*x^41 + 3839522698635*x^40 + 6870638011872*x^39 + 11333104697716*x^38 + 17125645447512*x^37 + 23608670479416*x^36 + 29686950111417*x^35 + 34344357427359*x^34 + 37529757733401*x^33 + 40911400587682*x^32 + 47869432087239*x^31 + 62397915900969*x^30 + 87173416357207*x^29 + 121567982889153*x^28 + 160646807469906*x^27 + 196048000668198*x^26 + 218830193211036*x^25 + 223051416042429*x^24 + 208061512418522*x^23 + 178240245392514*x^22 + 140680202501346*x^21 + 102455113676330*x^20 + 68795227244115*x^19 + 42466508518869*x^18 + 24004925503983*x^17 + 12389290809876*x^16 + 5846444036631*x^15 + 2550428759529*x^14 + 1055409519519*x^13 + 429448964193*x^12 + 175156476870*x^11 + 69704176482*x^10 + 25382069388*x^9 + 7889467365*x^8 + 1968690555*x^7 + 369945225*x^6 + 47213595*x^5 + 3108105*x^4)*y^14
	+ (120*x^56 + 3630*x^55 + 52650*x^54 + 487710*x^53 + 3246480*x^52 + 16544646*x^51 + 66850550*x^50 + 217032338*x^49 + 558837210*x^48 + 1061482148*x^47 + 995079548*x^46 - 2601777636*x^45 - 18353738004*x^44 - 67591116495*x^43 - 197791287579*x^42 - 505441001735*x^41 - 1167806857712*x^40 - 2472101642955*x^39 - 4812051004265*x^38 - 8607323922299*x^37 - 14117072440338*x^36 - 21189169372332*x^35 - 29090648220492*x^34 - 36609055716420*x^33 - 42497283173084*x^32 - 46086207543821*x^31 - 47707729790907*x^30 - 48627929676893*x^29 - 50440695784100*x^28 - 54155058362712*x^27 - 59435580494304*x^26 - 64515534510426*x^25 - 66991328746029*x^24 - 65076942933010*x^23 - 58493581605058*x^22 - 48462556028730*x^21 - 36980770959529*x^20 - 25971815657629*x^19 - 16752017091555*x^18 - 9887340151161*x^17 - 5316534044289*x^16 - 2595668359878*x^15 - 1151667037026*x^14 - 469182023910*x^13 - 179851187466*x^12 - 67015466763*x^11 - 24586040283*x^10 - 8578965339*x^9 - 2652159510*x^8 - 672607260*x^7 - 129792780*x^6 - 17168580*x^5 - 1184040*x^4)*y^13
	- (84*x^56 + 2310*x^55 + 29946*x^54 + 243558*x^53 + 1393398*x^52 + 5912920*x^51 + 18762440*x^50 + 41627404*x^49 + 41184397*x^48 - 141822130*x^47 - 965155094*x^46 - 3395002026*x^45 - 8979170862*x^44 - 19397953770*x^43 - 34680228594*x^42 - 48437076524*x^41 - 37399701877*x^40 + 57451872469*x^39 + 356954977279*x^38 + 1065023666645*x^37 + 2457764880781*x^36 + 4807549851693*x^35 + 8236011244179*x^34 + 12553621604359*x^33 + 17199164643955*x^32 + 21367993642823*x^31 + 24301861278993*x^30 + 25596396513703*x^29 + 25361507578481*x^28 + 24141134340674*x^27 + 22611318889758*x^26 + 21208626874524*x^25 + 19927436374989*x^24 + 18434704598528*x^23 + 16399248539920*x^22 + 13761779038376*x^21 + 10765494340226*x^20 + 7797365091580*x^19 + 5203374671444*x^18 + 3183301880118*x^17 + 1775268701388*x^16 + 897219773932*x^15 + 409154692452*x^14 + 168472403844*x^13 + 63358700528*x^12 + 22346976654*x^11 + 7623135822*x^10 + 2516889004*x^9 + 762585705*x^8 + 194643540*x^7 + 38296440*x^6 + 5225220*x^5 + 376740*x^4)*y^12
	+ (56*x^56 + 1386*x^55 + 15918*x^54 + 112938*x^53 + 552936*x^52 + 1939356*x^51 + 4654220*x^50 + 5261004*x^49 - 13393896*x^48 - 95990673*x^47 - 311493351*x^46 - 686721969*x^45 - 1018396422*x^44 - 516698391*x^43 + 2725306641*x^42 + 12312408601*x^41 + 33681837708*x^40 + 72511527966*x^39 + 129117375378*x^38 + 186549736494*x^37 + 193555128924*x^36 + 52100418783*x^35 - 371736853089*x^34 - 1198187791317*x^33 - 2456387617616*x^32 - 4024096074678*x^31 - 5634432615594*x^30 - 6960319632374*x^29 - 7737785539497*x^28 - 7868045652135*x^27 - 7446170321805*x^26 - 6694695506001*x^25 - 5837725129320*x^24 - 5000983672879*x^23 - 4203348063477*x^22 - 3421714864191*x^21 - 2654516223228*x^20 - 1936130019174*x^19 - 1314155392650*x^18 - 823078243008*x^17 - 471848627097*x^16 - 245551537467*x^15 - 115079486853*x^14 - 48295262115*x^13 - 18171253098*x^12 - 6224479383*x^11 - 2004792183*x^10 - 624020463*x^9 - 183377040*x^8 - 46767105*x^7 - 9324315*x^6 - 1306305*x^5 - 98280*x^4)*y^11
	- (35*x^56 + 770*x^55 + 7770*x^54 + 48090*x^53 + 204000*x^52 + 608985*x^51 + 1170551*x^50 + 654863*x^49 - 4375623*x^48 - 17370297*x^47 - 29877303*x^46 + 3952215*x^45 + 198955317*x^44 + 751713318*x^43 + 1887429762*x^42 + 3666544348*x^41 + 5555571409*x^40 + 5711678508*x^39 + 186573552*x^38 - 17123966892*x^37 - 52152505668*x^36 - 104423931540*x^35 - 158167221504*x^34 - 177365611566*x^33 - 113888272754*x^32 + 69366716074*x^31 + 372409485942*x^30 + 747329545474*x^29 + 1111407243886*x^28 + 1378543477344*x^27 + 1494563137776*x^26 + 1457990484468*x^25 + 1312563866301*x^24 + 1116627383369*x^23 + 913440165011*x^22 + 722619873969*x^21 + 549859582149*x^20 + 398137691121*x^19 + 271202021379*x^18 + 171935915841*x^17 + 100406070369*x^16 + 53444109789*x^15 + 25648034379*x^14 + 10982574141*x^13 + 4167340839*x^12 + 1406523426*x^11 + 432814254*x^10 + 126749016*x^9 + 35787009*x^8 + 9074541*x^7 + 1824039*x^6 + 261261*x^5 + 20475*x^4)*y^10
	+ (20*x^56 + 385*x^55 + 3395*x^54 + 18585*x^53 + 71280*x^52 + 199149*x^51 + 400481*x^50 + 581581*x^49 + 926210*x^48 + 3513720*x^47 + 15333720*x^46 + 50636640*x^45 + 128110389*x^44 + 257194263*x^43 + 409565041*x^42 + 478709737*x^41 + 246472022*x^40 - 592885883*x^39 - 2258925009*x^38 - 4462418523*x^37 - 5786156172*x^36 - 3351246465*x^35 + 6265212195*x^34 + 24262208487*x^33 + 46317508834*x^32 + 62021016410*x^31 + 59078132806*x^30 + 30145810738*x^29 - 22204449787*x^28 - 85323036524*x^27 - 141476545518*x^26 - 176005882398*x^25 - 183960562660*x^24 - 170511586078*x^23 - 145383641546*x^22 - 116759760022*x^21 - 89187004362*x^20 - 64721651280*x^19 - 44324693892*x^18 - 28388946384*x^17 - 16829440650*x^16 - 9129157586*x^15 - 4473873102*x^14 - 1953409866*x^13 - 749746557*x^12 - 251079609*x^11 - 74225859*x^10 - 20310867*x^9 - 5432658*x^8 - 1365546*x^7 - 275590*x^6 - 40194*x^5 - 3276*x^4)*y^9
	- (10*x^56 + 165*x^55 + 1275*x^54 + 6405*x^53 + 23865*x^52 + 70506*x^51 + 180710*x^50 + 468864*x^49 + 1358325*x^48 + 4007950*x^47 + 10651890*x^46 + 24290070*x^45 + 47174634*x^44 + 78082575*x^43 + 109642833*x^42 + 128676917*x^41 + 124530534*x^40 + 110338857*x^39 + 156382655*x^38 + 414448881*x^37 + 1076649285*x^36 + 2194699548*x^35 + 3385402068*x^34 + 3702635190*x^33 + 2073858862*x^32 - 1771885494*x^31 - 6682220874*x^30 - 10456235798*x^29 - 10975478730*x^28 - 7365952407*x^27 - 605054853*x^26 + 6869668209*x^25 + 12510700695*x^24 + 15051322810*x^23 + 14820580722*x^22 + 12928520538*x^21 + 10373258866*x^20 + 7767883140*x^19 + 5443559700*x^18 + 3556880208*x^17 + 2150825589*x^16 + 1191254364*x^15 + 596432404*x^14 + 265645140*x^13 + 103284504*x^12 + 34414656*x^11 + 9760992*x^10 + 2448108*x^9 + 600705*x^8 + 149442*x^7 + 30186*x^6 + 4466*x^5 + 378*x^4)*y^8
	+ (4*x^56 + 55*x^55 + 381*x^54 + 1863*x^53 + 7188*x^52 + 23778*x^51 + 73910*x^50 + 228272*x^49 + 677151*x^48 + 1818136*x^47 + 4310656*x^46 + 9046920*x^45 + 17030703*x^44 + 29285829*x^43 + 46989567*x^42 + 72120047*x^41 + 108591614*x^40 + 163231677*x^39 + 244376687*x^38 + 354376373*x^37 + 473137152*x^36 + 541118808*x^35 + 472518876*x^34 + 229185810*x^33 - 89030303*x^32 - 260955209*x^31 - 102227319*x^30 + 382988887*x^29 + 985778095*x^28 + 1395069978*x^27 + 1368081840*x^26 + 889706844*x^25 + 191291652*x^24 - 417656273*x^23 - 762852371*x^22 - 855070857*x^21 - 786457454*x^20 - 640610015*x^19 - 474941391*x^18 - 323344413*x^17 - 202037787*x^16 - 115124436*x^15 - 59137460*x^14 - 26935124*x^13 - 10628145*x^12 - 3527406*x^11 - 952608*x^10 - 209700*x^9 - 42972*x^8 - 10575*x^7 - 2133*x^6 - 319*x^5 - 28*x^4)*y^7
	- (x^56 + 11*x^55 + 73*x^54 + 363*x^53 + 1491*x^52 + 5478*x^51 + 19202*x^50 + 63316*x^49 + 187031*x^48 + 487312*x^47 + 1131296*x^46 + 2377984*x^45 + 4606116*x^44 + 8340816*x^43 + 14281576*x^42 + 23278232*x^41 + 36192835*x^40 + 53488545*x^39 + 74452091*x^38 + 96103225*x^37 + 112700429*x^36 + 118102677*x^35 + 112823391*x^34 + 109786573*x^33 + 125673427*x^32 + 160575983*x^31 + 192468017*x^30 + 194450143*x^29 + 153088217*x^28 + 77792428*x^27 - 535404*x^26 - 46942098*x^25 - 46833121*x^24 - 16533275*x^23 + 15773591*x^22 + 34774845*x^21 + 40535035*x^20 + 37456682*x^19 + 30029326*x^18 + 21565566*x^17 + 14017266*x^16 + 8245084*x^15 + 4351396*x^14 + 2028812*x^13 + 813656*x^12 + 269841*x^11 + 69027*x^10 + 12453*x^9 + 1491*x^8 + 363*x^7 + 73*x^6 + 11*x^5 + x^4)*y^6
	+ (45*x^51 + 485*x^50 + 2385*x^49 + 7710*x^48 + 19085*x^47 + 37635*x^46 + 59301*x^45 + 66825*x^44 + 19455*x^43 - 163935*x^42 - 623025*x^41 - 1579323*x^40 - 3348405*x^39 - 6329235*x^38 - 10911405*x^37 - 17215425*x^36 - 24583521*x^35 - 31311939*x^34 - 35750961*x^33 - 38236549*x^32 - 40595511*x^31 - 43477473*x^30 - 45727999*x^29 - 45392451*x^28 - 40717314*x^27 - 31733316*x^26 - 20845590*x^25 - 11881305*x^24 - 6919785*x^23 - 4955415*x^22 - 3998025*x^21 - 3278049*x^20 - 2583555*x^19 - 1911645*x^18 - 1315815*x^17 - 836295*x^16 - 487287*x^15 - 256945*x^14 - 120615*x^13 - 48855*x^12 - 16360*x^11 - 4086*x^10 - 630*x^9)*y^5
	- (9*x^51 + 71*x^50 + 281*x^49 + 840*x^48 + 2015*x^47 + 4169*x^46 + 7551*x^45 + 12261*x^44 + 17865*x^43 + 23535*x^42 + 27993*x^41 + 30897*x^40 + 34857*x^39 + 50895*x^38 + 106665*x^37 + 261963*x^36 + 610857*x^35 + 1198743*x^34 + 1877517*x^33 + 2414924*x^32 + 2787173*x^31 + 3087003*x^30 + 3343301*x^29 + 3553955*x^28 + 3605490*x^27 + 3376338*x^26 + 2780622*x^25 + 1976247*x^24 + 1264965*x^23 + 817155*x^22 + 530253*x^21 + 342747*x^20 + 218667*x^19 + 136125*x^18 + 81855*x^17 + 46929*x^16 + 25371*x^15 + 12701*x^14 + 5795*x^13 + 2325*x^12 + 794*x^11 + 206*x^10 + 36*x^9)*y^4
	+ (x^51 + 5*x^50 + 19*x^49 + 55*x^48 + 140*x^47 + 316*x^46 + 660*x^45 + 1284*x^44 + 2370*x^43 + 4170*x^42 + 7062*x^41 + 11550*x^40 + 18348*x^39 + 28380*x^38 + 42900*x^37 + 63492*x^36 + 89310*x^35 + 108654*x^34 + 106930*x^33 + 92402*x^32 + 76903*x^31 + 57001*x^30 + 36791*x^29 + 10330*x^28 - 17820*x^27 - 48048*x^26 - 66000*x^25 - 63492*x^24 - 42900*x^23 - 28380*x^22 - 18348*x^21 - 11550*x^20 - 7062*x^19 - 4170*x^18 - 2370*x^17 - 1284*x^16 - 660*x^15 - 316*x^14 - 140*x^13 - 55*x^12 - 19*x^11 - 5*x^10 - x^9)*y^3
	+ (325*x^35 + 1599*x^34 + 2907*x^33 + 3350*x^32 + 4017*x^31 + 3999*x^30 + 4249*x^29 + 3843*x^28 + 3603*x^27 + 2585*x^26 + 1485*x^25)*y^2
	- (25*x^35 + 49*x^34 + 9*x^33 + 32*x^32 - 7*x^31 + 15*x^30 - 23*x^29 - 2*x^28 - 39*x^27 - 19*x^26 - 55*x^25)*y
	+ x^35 - x^34 + x^33 - x^32 + x^31 - x^30 + x^29 - x^28 + x^27 - x^26 + x^25;
q := x+1;
t := -x*y/(x+1);E:=[(1+q)*t+(2-q),0,q*t^2+(1-q)*t,0,0];
P:=[-t,t^2];
